examples: It is hard to negotiate with a fellow lawmaker if the next minute you walk out on the steps and call [him] a weasel.
The party's most flamboyant lawmaker is a transvestite actor and singer.
What's more, it's clear the lawmaker lied about his personal misconduct, blatantly and repeatedly.
The Ocala-Marion County lawmaker said the Sanford incident is not a reflection on the law.
Aides to the president-elect said "a clear favorite" for the post was Socialist lawmaker Jean-Marc Ayrault.
